pages.text: doMeteorSpawning_MH:$(br)True/False$(br)$(t:default_value)False$(/t)$(br)Makes meteor fall from the sky.$(br2)powerLimit_MH:$(br)Whole Number$(br)$(t:default_value)1$(/t)$(br)The amount of powers a player may have at once.
givePowersAboveLimit_MH:$(br)True/False$(br)$(t:default_value)False$(/t)$(br)Allows someone to add more powers that his limits but makes him take damage when he has.
